# Raphael Wennmacher — Portfolio

> HCI researcher, UX/UI designer, and developer based in Munich.
> Finishing a master's in HCI and CS at LMU Munich.
> Freelancing for 5+ years crafting digital products with intent.

## About

Raphael Wennmacher is a product designer and developer who specialises in
Human-Computer Interaction (HCI), UX/UI systems, and AI interfaces. He builds
end-to-end digital products — from research and wireframes to production code.

## Projects

- [Tradar](https://raffi.studio/projects/tradar): UX/UI and web design case study. React, Rive animations, user flows. Munich, 2023.
- [LMU Students App](https://raffi.studio/projects/lmu-app): Full-stack mobile app for LMU Munich students. Flutter, Python/FastAPI, PostgreSQL, Docker. Munich, Fall 2024.
- [Convert & Compress](https://raffi.studio/projects/convert-compress): Native macOS app for image conversion and compression. Swift, Xcode. Munich, Winter 2025.
